title: Total supplement deductions 2024
description: Complete the total supplement deductions section of your supplementary tax return.
keywords: Individual tax return instructions, TaxPack supplement, deductions, tax return, 2024, supplement deductions, paper form, paper return, paper lodgement

content_blocks.text: Did you claim any deductions at questions D11 to D15 ?
To complete this question, follow the steps below.
Add up all the deduction amounts in the right-hand column of questions D11 to D15 in your supplementary tax return.
Write the total from Step 1 at Total supplement deductions in your supplementary tax return.
Transfer the amount you wrote at Total supplement deductions to label D below question D10 in your tax return.
Go to Total deductions 2024 , then work through the Losses section of the tax return.

items: Go to question T3 Superannuation contributions on behalf of your spouse 2024 .
Return to main menu Individual tax return instructions 2024 .
Go back to question D15 Other deductions not claimable elsewhere in your return 2024 .

content_text:
## Things you need to know
Did you claim any deductions at questions D11 to D15 ?
- No – Go to Step 4 .
- Yes – Go to Step 1 .
## Completing your supplementary tax return
To complete this question, follow the steps below.
### Step 1
Add up all the deduction amounts in the right-hand column of questions D11 to D15 in your supplementary tax return.
### Step 2
Write the total from Step 1 at Total supplement deductions in your supplementary tax return.
### Step 3
Transfer the amount you wrote at Total supplement deductions to label D below question D10 in your tax return.
### Step 4
Go to Total deductions 2024 , then work through the Losses section of the tax return.
## Where to go next
- Go to question T3 Superannuation contributions on behalf of your spouse 2024 .
- Return to main menu Individual tax return instructions 2024 .
- Go back to question D15 Other deductions not claimable elsewhere in your return 2024 .
